title: Opening for Production Engineer at Wavin India

jsonLd.title: Opening for Production Engineer at Wavin India
jsonLd.description:
Wavin India has an exciting opening for a Production Engineer at our Mysuru office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Wavin India:
Wavin India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in ISO 9001

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Wavin India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
